'''yoshajaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:jubilean|jubilean]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-sh-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jubilean|jubilean]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yoshajaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yoshajithi|yoshajithi]] || [[word:yoshajiji|yoshajiji]] || [[word:yoshajishi|yoshajishi]] || [[word:yoshajiki|yoshajiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yoshajuthuthu|yoshajuthuthu]] || [[word:yoshajujuju|yoshajujuju]] || [[word:yoshajushushu|yoshajushushu]] || [[word:yoshajukuku|yoshajukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yoshajuthu|yoshajuthu]] || [[word:yoshajuju|yoshajuju]] || [[word:yoshajushu|yoshajushu]] || [[word:yoshajuku|yoshajuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yoshajufthuf|yoshajufthuf]] || [[word:yoshajufjuf|yoshajufjuf]] || [[word:yoshajufshuf|yoshajufshuf]] || [[word:yoshajufkuf|yoshajufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yoshajethe|yoshajethe]] || [[word:yoshajeje|yoshajeje]] || [[word:yoshajeshe|yoshajeshe]] || [[word:yoshajeke|yoshajeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yoshajothotho|yoshajothotho]] || [[word:yoshajojojo|yoshajojojo]] || [[word:yoshajoshosho|yoshajoshosho]] || [[word:yoshajokoko|yoshajokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yoshajotho|yoshajotho]] || [[word:yoshajojo|yoshajojo]] || [[word:yoshajosho|yoshajosho]] || [[word:yoshajoko|yoshajoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yoshajofthof|yoshajofthof]] || [[word:yoshajofjof|yoshajofjof]] || [[word:yoshajofshof|yoshajofshof]] || [[word:yoshajofkof|yoshajofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:yoshajïfthïf|yoshajïfthïf]] || [[word:yoshajïfjïf|yoshajïfjïf]] || [[word:yoshajïfshïf|yoshajïfshïf]] || [[word:yoshajïfkïf|yoshajïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:yoshajïfthïfthïf|yoshajïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:yoshajïfjïfjïf|yoshajïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:yoshajïfshïfshïf|yoshajïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:yoshajïfkïfkïf|yoshajïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:yoshajïfthïf|yoshajïfthïf]] || [[word:yoshajïfjïf|yoshajïfjïf]] || [[word:yoshajïfshïf|yoshajïfshïf]] || [[word:yoshajïfkïf|yoshajïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:yoshajïfthïf|yoshajïfthïf]] || [[word:yoshajïfjïf|yoshajïfjïf]] || [[word:yoshajïfshïf|yoshajïfshïf]] || [[word:yoshajïfkïf|yoshajïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yoshajæthæ|yoshajæthæ]] || [[word:yoshajæjæ|yoshajæjæ]] || [[word:yoshajæshæ|yoshajæshæ]] || [[word:yoshajækæ|yoshajækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yoshajathatha|yoshajathatha]] || [[word:yoshajajaja|yoshajajaja]] || [[word:yoshajashasha|yoshajashasha]] || [[word:yoshajakaka|yoshajakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yoshajatha|yoshajatha]] || [[word:yoshajaja|yoshajaja]] || [[word:yoshajasha|yoshajasha]] || [[word:yoshajaka|yoshajaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yoshajafthaf|yoshajafthaf]] || [[word:yoshajafjaf|yoshajafjaf]] || [[word:yoshajafshaf|yoshajafshaf]] || [[word:yoshajafkaf|yoshajafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:yoshajasha|yoshajasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:yoshajshësha|yoshajshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yoshajrosha|yoshajrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yoshajmusha|yoshajmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:yoshajyasha|yoshajyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyoshajnkshësha|goyoshajnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyoshajnkrosha|goyoshajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyoshajnkmusha|goyoshajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyoshajnkyasha|goyoshajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:yoshashajasha|yoshashajasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yoshashajshësha|yoshashajshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yoshashajrosha|yoshashajrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yoshashajmusha|yoshashajmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yoshashajyasha|yoshashajyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyoshashajnkshësha|goyoshashajnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyoshashajnkrosha|goyoshashajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyoshashajnkmusha|goyoshashajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyoshashajnkyasha|goyoshashajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:yeshæjasha|yeshæjasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yeshæjshësha|yeshæjshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yeshæjrosha|yeshæjrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yeshæjmusha|yeshæjmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yeshæjyasha|yeshæjyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyeshæjnkshësha|goyeshæjnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyeshæjnkrosha|goyeshæjnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyeshæjnkmusha|goyeshæjnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyeshæjnkyasha|goyeshæjnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:yoshfajasha|yoshfajasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yoshfajshësha|yoshfajshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yoshfajrosha|yoshfajrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yoshfajmusha|yoshfajmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yoshfajyasha|yoshfajyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyoshfajnkshësha|goyoshfajnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyoshfajnkrosha|goyoshfajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyoshfajnkmusha|goyoshfajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyoshfajnkyasha|goyoshfajnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
